project_type: Flutter Android app with native C++ DSP pipeline via Oboe, using OnnxRuntime for DNN inference
build_system: Flutter + CMake (NDK r25c). CMakeLists.txt at android/app/src/main/cpp/CMakeLists.txt. Cannot build in sandbox (no NDK/SDK installed).
test_framework: Standalone C++ host tests (g++ -std=c++17), Flutter integration_test/, Python simulation harnesses
build_command: flutter build apk --release (requires Android SDK/NDK, not available in sandbox)
test_command: g++ -std=c++17 -O2 test file and run (for host tests); AST/pattern validation for code correctness
verification_instructions: 1. Verify Python export script runs without syntax errors (python -c 'import ast; ast.parse(open(f).read())'). 2. Verify C++ compiles with g++ on host (standalone test files). 3. Verify CMakeLists.txt changes are syntactically correct. 4. Verify the ONNX model interface matches what C++ expects (shape conventions).
snapshot_or_generated_files: android/app/src/main/assets/dnn_denoiser/gtcrn_dual_core.onnx - generated by running tools/export_gtcrn_dual_core.py on user's Windows machine
setup_instructions: Cannot build natively in sandbox. Use AST validation for Python, syntax checks for C++.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot download packages, NDK, or run Android builds. All code must be validated via static analysis. Python export script is meant to run on user's Windows machine (torch 2.12.1+cpu, einops available). The .onnx model file cannot be generated here.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns in dnn_denoiser.cpp (STFT, OLA, ONNX session). Header-only for beamformer (like mvdr_beamformer.h). Keep backward compatibility with EnhancementEngineMode enum.
key_patterns: 1. processOneFrame() in dnn_denoiser.cpp shows the STFT->ONNX->iSTFT pattern for mono. 2. MvdrBeamformer is header-only with inline FFT. 3. Worker thread + SPSC ring architecture for async inference. 4. Resampler (polyphase 48->16 kHz) already working. 5. ONNX model convention: inputs[0]=mix[1,257,1,2], inputs[1..3]=caches, outputs[0]=enh[1,257,1,2], outputs[1..3]=updated caches. 6. EnhancementEngineMode enum: kBypass=0, kDualChannelDnn=1, kMvdrBackup=2.
directory_structure: android/app/src/main/cpp/ - native C++ DSP; android/app/src/main/cpp/dnn_denoiser/ - DNN wrapper + ONNX headers; android/app/src/main/cpp/dnn_denoiser/pytorch_lite/ - LibTorch headers; android/app/src/main/assets/dnn_denoiser/ - model files (.onnx, .ptl); tools/ - Python utility scripts; lib/ - Dart/Flutter code
